name: Tofu Rice Stir Fry
recipeIngredient: 1 package Mori-Nu silken extra firm tofu -- drained and cut into 1/2-inch cubes (10.5 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine soy sauce, rice vinegar, sesame oil, and tofu in a bowl.
2. Marinate the mixture in the refrigerator for a minimum of 1 hour.
3. Heat the soy sauce, rice vinegar, sesame oil, and tofu mixture in a wok over medium heat.
4. Add celery, carrots, scallions, and ginger to the wok.
5. Stir fry until all vegetables are just crisp tender.
6. Add cooked rice to the wok and stir fry until heated through.
7. Serve hot.
Makes 2 servings of 2 cups each.
